name: Civic Center Park
description: Civic Center Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Princeton, MN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Civic Center Park opens at 6am and closes at 10pm

name: Irec Fitness Center
description: Irec Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Isle, MN. There are 9 asphalt courts. 6 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: Isle High School
description: Isle High School is a place to play pickleball in Isle, MN. There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Izatys
description: Izatys is a place to play pickleball in Onamia, MN. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Milaca Recreation Park
description: Milaca Recreation Park is a place to play pickleball in Milaca, MN. There are 6 outdoor concrete and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
